techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands.

techniques.name: PowerShell
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse PowerShell commands and scripts for execution.

techniques.name: OS Credential Dumping
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to dump credentials.

techniques.name: LSASS Memory
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to access credential material in LSASS.

techniques.name: Brute Force
techniques.description: Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access.

techniques.name: Password Guessing
techniques.description: Adversaries may guess passwords to obtain access.

techniques.name: Application Layer Protocol
techniques.description: Adversaries may communicate using application layer protocols.

techniques.name: DNS
techniques.description: Adversaries may use DNS for C2.

techniques.name: Sudo and Sudo Caching
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse sudo for privilege escalation.

techniques.name: Non-Standard Port
techniques.description: Adversaries may use non-standard ports for C2.
